1: And hide my commandments with thee;
2: And And apply thine heart to understanding;
3: And And liftest up thy voice for understanding;
4: And searchest for her as for for hid treasures;
5: And find the knowledge of God.
6: Out of his mouth cometh cometh knowledge and understanding.
7: He is He is a buckler to them that walk uprightly.
8: And preserveth the way of his saints.
9: And equity; yea yea , every good path.
10: And knowledge is pleasant unto thy soul;
12: From the man that speaketh froward things;
13: To walk in the ways of darkness;
14: And And delight in the frowardness of the wicked;
15: And they they froward in their paths:
16: Even Even from the stranger which which flattereth with her words;
17: And forgetteth the covenant of her God.
18: And her paths unto the dead.
19: Neither take they hold of the paths of life.
20: And keep the paths of the righteous.
21: And the perfect shall remain in it.
22: And the transgressors shall be rooted out of it.
